panels.description: Shows the total number of unassigned assets of computer system class.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name`,
   currentDate() AS __time__,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) < 30 THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 60 days'
   END) AS __metric__,
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS Count,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Building` AS Site,
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` AS Manager,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` AS Status,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`
ON (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Supported by'
)
WHERE
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
   AND (
 `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`Full Name` IS NULL AND 
 `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Form Type` = 'People'
 AND `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` IS NOT NULL
)
AND ((Site In ($Site) AND Site is not null) AND (PrimaryCapability In ($Capability) and PrimaryCapability is not null) AND (Manager In ($Managed) AND Manager is not null) AND (Status In ($Status) and Status is not null) AND (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Company` In ($Company)))
GROUP BY 
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) < 30 THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 60 days'
   END),
   Site, Manager, Status, PrimaryCapability

panels.title: Unassigned Assets

panels.description: Shows the total number of refreshed assets of computer system class.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` AS Manager,
   (CASE
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) AS __metric__ ,
   currentDate() AS __time__,
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS Count,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Building` AS Site,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` AS Status
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
WHERE (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET')
AND (Site In ($Site) AND PrimaryCapability In ($Capability) AND (Manager In ($Managed) AND Manager is not null) AND Status In ($Status) AND (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Company` In ($Company)))
GROUP BY 
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name`,
    __metric__, Site, Manager, Status, PrimaryCapability

panels.title: Refreshed Assets

panels.description: Shows the total number of assets  of computer system class that have been scanned for vulnerabilities.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   currentDate() AS __time__,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Never Scanned'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) AS __metric__,
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS Count,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Building` AS Site,
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` AS Manager,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` AS Status,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
WHERE (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
)
AND (Site In ($Site) AND PrimaryCapability In ($Capability) AND (Manager In ($Managed) AND Manager is not null) AND Status In ($Status) AND (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Company` In ($Company)))
GROUP BY 
   __metric__, Site, Manager , Status, PrimaryCapability

panels.title: Scanned Assets

panels.description: Shows the distribution of unassigned assets  of computer system class.

SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` AS Manager,

      WHEN (

   END) AS Age,
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS Count,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Building` AS Site,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` AS Status,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`
ON (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Supported by'
)
WHERE
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
   AND (
 `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`Full Name` IS NULL
 AND `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Form Type` = 'People'
 AND `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` IS NOT NULL
)
AND (Site In ($Site) AND PrimaryCapability In ($Capability) AND (Manager In ($Managed) AND Manager is not null) AND Status In ($Status)  AND (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Company` In ($Company)))
GROUP BY 
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) < 30 THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 60 days'
   END), Site, Status, PrimaryCapability

   (CASE
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) AS Age,
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS Count,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Building` AS Site,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` AS Status,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
WHERE (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET'
)
AND (Site In ($Site) AND PrimaryCapability In ($Capability) AND (Manager In ($Managed) AND Manager is not null) AND Status In ($Status) AND (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Company` In ($Company)))
GROUP BY 
    Age,
    Manager, Site, Status, PrimaryCapability

LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (

AND (

panels.title: Scanned Asset Distribution

panels.description: Shows the distribution of assets  of computer system class by site.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   (CASE WHEN `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Building` is null then 'No Site' else `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Building` END) AS Site,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` is null THEN 'Not Managed' else `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` END)  AS Manager,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability,
   --`AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` AS Status,
   (COUNT(`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Instance Id`)) AS Count
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
WHERE (`AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET')
   AND (Site In ($Site) AND PrimaryCapability In ($Capability) AND (Manager In ($Managed)) AND `AST:ComputerSystem`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` In ($Status))
GROUP BY 
   PrimaryCapability,
   Manager,
   Site,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`AssetLifecycleStatus`
